news_bbc.title: Thames Water moves step closer to nationalisation after government objects to rescue deal
news_bbc.summary: The environment secretary says the deal does not do enough for consumers or the environment.

news_bbc.title: Japan raises interest rate to highest for 31 years
news_bbc.summary: The Bank of Japan has been raising rates from near-zero since 2024.

news_bbc.title: SpaceX IPO raised $10bn more than thought
news_bbc.summary: The company's listing raised $87.5bn, compared with the $75bn it was initially thought.

news_bbc.title: How could the US-Iran deal affect oil prices and the cost of food?
news_bbc.summary: Experts warn the impact of the war will continue to affect the global economy for months to come.

news_bbc.title: Is the convertible heading into the sunset?
news_bbc.summary: UK drivers have taken a shine to the SUV but could the fate of the convertible be reversed?

news_bbc.title: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
news_bbc.summary: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.

news_bbc.title: What's happening to UK petrol and diesel prices now the US and Iran have a deal?
news_bbc.summary: When the conflict began on 28 February, fuel costs jumped as the war disrupted the production and transportation of energy across the Middle East.

news_bbc.title: Anthropic to meet White House over AI tool suspension
news_bbc.summary: The sudden meeting was called after Anthropic had to block users from just-released AI models.
